entry.title: New: RES26-153 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO RETAIN THE LEGAL SERVICES OF KOBAYASHI SUGITA & GODA, LLP AS SPECIAL COUNSEL TO REPRESENT THE HONOLULU LIQUOR COMMISSION IN POST-SETTLEMENT PROCEEDINGS IN THE LEGAL ACTION ENTITLED SCARLET HONOLULU, INC., ET AL. V. HONOLULU LIQUOR COMMISSION, ET AL., CASE NO. CV 21-00457 KJM (USDC).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
